chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-828 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case. 24-09-2025 M/s Badaruddin Memon and Syed Tanveer Abbas Shah, Advocates along with petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G a/w Muhammad Akram, DSP Legal on behalf of SSP, Sukkur. **** Counsel for the petitioner submit that grievance of the petitioner has been redressed; therefore, under instructions, they do not press instant petition, which is accordingly disposed of as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
